title: CVE-2026-16796: AWS Bedrock AgentCore Python SDK RCE
summary: [P1] The AWS Bedrock AgentCore Python SDK is vulnerable to improper neutralization of argument delimiters, with no patch available. This vulnerability can be exploited to gain unauthorized access to sensitive data. Why now: Reported attribution (unverified): none (confidence: 0.90)
classification_reasoning: The vulnerability is a remote code execution vulnerability in a software development kit.

enrichment.lede: CVE-2026-16796 - Improper neutralization of argument delimiters in AWS Bedrock AgentCore Python SDK install_packages().

title: CVE-2026-16756: aws-smithy-http-server DoS
summary: [P2] The default aws-smithy-http-server is vulnerable to a Slowloris denial of service attack, with no patch available. This vulnerability can be exploited to cause a denial of service. Why now: Reported attribution (unverified): none (confidence: 0.70)
classification_reasoning: The vulnerability is a denial of service vulnerability in a cloud service.

enrichment.lede: CVE-2026-16756 - Allocation of resources without limits in the default aws-smithy-http-server serve() path allows unauthenticated Slowloris denial of service.
